title: Question: Cross Module Reference Error
body:
---


Author Name: **Adithya Shashidhara**
Original Redmine Message: 1673 from https://www.veripool.org



---

Hi, I used Verilator to convert my SV DUT to System C. Since my verification environment is in SV, I created a Verilog wrapper so that my DUT and TB can interact. However I am facing trouble in accessing my DUT signals in TB. 

Code in TB is : 

assign signal = module1.instantiatedmodule.signal;

module1 is the top module of the DUT, which has an instantiated module in which the signal is defined. However since RTL is converted to System C, I am getting XMR error.

Can you guys  help me and tell how to access those signals in System C in a SV Test Bench???
